nasb.text: I thought, ‘After she has done all these things she will return to Me’; but she did not return, and her treacherous sister Judah saw it.

esv.text: And I thought, ‘After she has done all this she will return to me,’ but she did not return, and her treacherous sister Judah saw it.

cnv.text: 我以為她作了這些事以後，就必回轉過來，可是她沒有回轉。她詭詐的妹妹猶大也看見了。

ccb.text: 我以为她放纵之后会回到我身边，她却执迷不悟。她不忠的妹妹犹大也看见了这事。
